buttons.action: async ({ context }): Promise<void> => {const resp: { id: string } = await context.createRecord({boardId: context.boardId,objectKey: 'customsBroker__c',json: {},});context.navigateToRecord({recordId: resp.id,objectKey: 'customsBroker__c',});}
